backFields.label: How to Use
backFields.value: Hold this card up to clothing items when shopping. Colors that closely match any color on this card will be flattering on you. Focus on colors nearest to your face for maximum impact.

backFields.label: Color Accuracy
backFields.value: All colors are CMYK calibrated for accurate real-world matching across different lighting conditions.

locations.relevantText: Perfect for shopping in fashion districts!
